item.description:
My Calisthenics Programs: 👉 https://fitnessfaqs.com
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
Most of us spend the majority of our day sitting behind a computer or using a mobile phones. We tend to sit in a hunched posture which causes havoc to our neck, shoulders and back.
Pain, weakness and tightness is all very common when sitting all day.
There is no perfect posture, there is no poor posture, there is no bad posture, the problem is we don't move enough. A lack of movement causes our joints to become stiff and muscles to lose strength.
I'm going to show you the best exercises and stretches to improve mobility and flexibility. You'll learn how to fix your posture, find relief from pain and correct movement dysfunction.
If you found this video helpful share it with a friend.
item.title: How to Fix BAD POSTURE (FOREVER!)
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
My Calisthenics Programs: 👉 https://fitnessfaqs.com
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
item.title: Big Chest By Bodyweight Only
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
✅ BEST Calisthenics Workouts: https://fitnessfaqs.com/programs/
🔥 SOCIAL MEDIA: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.tiktok.com/@fitnessfaqs.com
🎤 PODCAST: https://fitnessfaqspodcast.buzzsprout.com/
This FitnessFAQs video covers the only 3 chest exercises you need to build muscle. All you need is a pair of gymnastic rings and dumbbells to grow a bigger chest. It's possible to target the upper chest, middle chest and lower chest with minimal equipment. Everyone can apply the concepts to any chest workout at home or at the gym.
item.title: The ONLY 3 Chest Exercises You Need To Build Muscle
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
My Calisthenics Programs: 👉 https://fitnessfaqs.com
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
MUSIC: Title: Slips & Slurs - Divided VIP Video Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VPxUQiH--kU
In this video I will show you how to train your abs dynamically as well as statically on a pull up bar. The exercises will be done whilst hanging and I am going to demonstrate a beginner and advanced workout. The exercises include variations of hanging knee raises and hanging leg raises.
If you are one of the 1% of people who actually read the description box know that training your abs if you are a fat expecting to develop a six pack is an absolute joke and waste of time. Get a low body fat % and hit them hard 1-2x a week with dedicated ab work. The rest of the magic comes from progressive overload on compound movements. All the best.
item.title: Calisthenics Six Pack Abs Workout (BEGINNER TO ADVANCED)
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
Get Your FREE Calisthenics Workout ✅ https://fitnessfaqs.com/homehero/
Connect With Me: 👉 https://www.instagram.com/fitnessfaqs/ 👉 https://www.tiktok.com/@fitnessfaqs.com 👉 https://facebook.com/fitnessfaqs
Podcast: 🎙️ https://fitnessfaqspodcast.buzzsprout.com/
#fitnessfaqs #shorts #chest
Today we're covering the perfect chest exercise with no weights.
Those of you looking for bodyweight chest exercises, this one is perfect at home. Wondering how to grow your chest? The ring fly is best for lower, middle and upper chest. Watch the tutorial to learn how to increase muscle size and add mass to your chest with calisthenics.
item.title: The Perfect CHEST Exercise 💪
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
🔥 Become a Calisthenics Pro 👉 https://fitnessfaqs.com
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
This FitnessFAQs workout tutorial is going to cover how to dragon flag. We will be discussing the best ab and core progression from beginner to advanced.
The dragon flag exercise was made popular by both bruce lee and rocky. It's an excellent exercise because it involves a hollow body, anti-extension based posture and technique.
There are several variations from easy to hard including eccentrics or negatives, full range of motion, extensions and also isometric holds. Anyone involved in calisthenics or bodyweight training will benefit from mastering this exercise.
A guideline for how to use dragon flags in your calisthenics core and ab workout is provided at the end. For those of you reading this, show some love by liking the video and dropping a comment. Don't forget to subscribe and turn on the bell notifications to never miss a new video.
item.title: How To DRAGON FLAG Tutorial (Beginner & Advanced Progressions)
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
Get Your FREE Calisthenics Workout ✅ https://fitnessfaqs.com/homehero/
Connect With Me: 👉 https://www.instagram.com/fitnessfaqs/ 👉 https://www.tiktok.com/@fitnessfaqs.com 👉 https://facebook.com/fitnessfaqs
Podcast: 🎙️ https://fitnessfaqspodcast.buzzsprout.com/
#fitness #gym #workout #bodybuilding #fitnessfaqs
Have you ever been frustrated when you can't feel your chest during workout. The video will show you 1 easy fix to feel your chest working during pushups.
The key here is understanding how to fully recruit the pecs. By placing the rings far apart, your body is forced to use the chest as the arms return to the support position. This is the best way and solves the ongoing issue of how to do pushups if the goal is increasing mass in the chest. This principle can be applied to several different bodyweight exercises including the bulgarian push up and the archer pushup.
Use this idea in your workout and training for a bigger chest!
item.title: Can't Feel Your Chest? Do This ✅
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
CONQUER CALISTHENICS 💪 https://fitnessfaqs.com/programs
Today's video is the perfect ring workout for size and strength. We're going to hit the full upper body including the chest, shoulders, back and arms. Beginner, intermediate and advanced calisthenics levels are going to enjoy this high volume routine. Get ready for muscle growth with the best piece of equipment for bodyweight training, gymnastic rings. Building muscle mass with calisthenics is definitely possible, try the routine and become a believer.
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
item.title: The PERFECT Ring Workout for MUSCLE GROWTH
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
Master Your Body ➤ http://www.fitnessfaqs.tv
FOLLOW FITNESSFAQS: http://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs http://facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
TRAINING PROGRAMS: http://bodybyrings.com http://planche.pro http://limitlesslegs.com
MUSIC: https://soundcloud.com/sappheirosmusic/celestial
In this video Daniel Vadnal of FitnessFAQs will teach you how to make progress beyond the regular hollow body hold exercise. Being able to sustain a hollow body is essential for advanced gymnastic exercises. If the anterior core is weak, the lower back will arch and creating a disconnect between the arms and legs during a skill or exercise. Using a rocking motion, bands and or weight will create a de-stabilising effect forcing the core to work harder. It is a must to continue to challenge yourself when an exercise gets too easy. This video shows 5 different ways to challenge the core and will allow you to construct workouts of an appropriate intensity.
item.title: 5 Ways to Master the Hollow Body Exercise
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
My Calisthenics Programs: 👉 https://fitnessfaqs.com
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
MUSIC: [Chill] Shuhandz & High Flown - Apex
In this video both incorrect and correct form for the hanging leg and knee raises is taught. It's very common for people to do the exercise in a sloppy manner which decreases abdominal activation and resulting strength and hypertrophy.
Slow down, be patient with exercise technique and follow the recommendations for stronger and bigger abs.
item.title: The WORST Ab Training MISTAKES | Leg Raises
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
Train At Home: 👉 https://fitnessfaqs.com
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
Are you someone who can't feel your chest with push-ups? This fitnessfaqs tutorial will cover how to use rings to train at home. After watching, you'll learn the bulgarian push-up, an awesome exercise for chest size. They feel comparable to dumbbell fly's and the good news, no weights or gym needed!
Before you get upset saying you don't have equipment, I'll give options so you can workout at home.
item.title: The BEST PUSH-UP For BIGGER CHEST

item.description:
🔥 Build Muscle At Home ➡️ https://fitnessfaqs.com/programs
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.tiktok.com/@fitnessfaqs.com
This FitnessFAQs tutorial video covers the 2 best chest and triceps exercises. The beauty of bodyweight training and calisthenics is we can workout at home. The rings are perfect for all levels to use at home, beginner to advanced. Calisthenics dips are the best exercise for building muscle and growing bigger. Long term progression is possible making it a usefull all round exercise. You will finish this video ready to train at home and construct your own workout program.
item.title: 2 Best CHEST and TRICEPS Exercises (NO WEIGHTS)
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
My Calisthenics Programs: 👉 https://fitnessfaqs.com
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
In this video we'll be covering how to fix chest pain from dips. Costochondritis is painful when breathing, located in the middle of the chest or sternum and can be uncomfortable. This condition is generally brought on with weighted dips or doing too many dips too soon. The symptoms can be felt during or after doing dips.
FitnessFAQs will be covering chest pain relief exercises you can do including stretches, mobility and strength. Costochondritis is a self limiting condition which will get better over time. Abstain from painful exercises to allow inflammation to settle.
item.title: How to Fix Chest Pain From Dips
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
My Calisthenics Programs: 👉 https://fitnessfaqs.com
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
This FItnessFAQs video covers 6 pack abs for calisthenics. To build a bulletproof core functional for the demands of our training, we need to work on ant-extension exercises. The ab-wheel rollout using gymnastic rings and bird dog are two perfect at home exercises. This tutorial explains how to get a strong six pack which can handle calisthenics and build muscle at the same time. These moves can be done using any suspension trainer such as a TRX if desired.
item.title: BULLETPROOF 6 PACK ABS for CALISTHENICS
item.author: FitnessFAQs

item.description:
🔥 The #1 Calisthenics Programs ➡️ http://fitnessfaqs.com/
Follow Me: https://www.instagram.com/FitnessFAQs https://www.tiktok.com/@fitnessfaqs.com https://www.facebook.com/FitnessFAQs
Get ready for the best hollow body hold tutorial, beginner to advanced progressions.
The hollow body exercise is an important abs workout for calisthenics, crossfit and gymnastics.
FitnessFAQs will show how to use this exercise with no equipment for at home workouts. We don't need a gym or weights to get effective results.
Building a strong core and six pack abs requires intelligent nutrition first and foremost. Next you need to be consistent with calisthenics. You will learn how to use the hollow body hold working from easy to hard, beginner to advanced.
item.title: The BEST HOLLOW BODY Progressions - Beginner to Advanced
item.author: FitnessFAQs
